    C

    Char32 - Record Class in de.kleinert.edna.data
    A Char32 is a representation of a UTF-32 codepoint.
    Char32(int) - Constructor for record class de.kleinert.edna.data.Char32
    Creates an instance of a Char32 record class.
    close() - Method in class de.kleinert.edna.reader.CodePointIterator
     
    code() - Method in record class de.kleinert.edna.data.Char32
    Returns the value of the code record component.

    Creates a new instance based on the callee by using a EdnaOptions.Builder.

    Copies the contents of the input into a new instance.
